title: Why “ed harris dutton ranch season 2” is trending in US: 5,000+ searches, the facts (July 19, 2026)
description: “ed harris dutton ranch season 2” is trending in US with 5,000+ searches reported by Google. The verified coverage behind the spike, from AL.com and 2 more.

sources.title: ‘Dutton Ranch’ season 2 cast changes: See who isn’t coming back
Is ‘Dutton Ranch’ on tonight? How many episodes are in ‘Dutton Ranch’? ‘Dutton Ranch’ Season 2 release date info
Kelly Reilly and Cole Hauser Confirm They'll Start Filming ‘Dutton Ranch’ Season Two in “Early 2027”

sections.heading: What is trending: “ed harris dutton ranch season 2”
paragraphs: “ed harris dutton ranch season 2” appeared on Google Trends' Trending Now list for US (snapshot taken 2026-07-19T18:02:32+00:00 UTC). Google reports at least 5,000 searches for this term — that figure is a lower bound published in the official Trends feed, not an exact count.

sections.heading: What's behind the spike — the coverage
paragraphs: The Trends feed associates this search spike with 3 news stories from AL.com, Decider, Holler Country Music. The headlines, exactly as published:
list: “‘Dutton Ranch’ season 2 cast changes: See who isn’t coming back” — AL.com
“Is ‘Dutton Ranch’ on tonight? How many episodes are in ‘Dutton Ranch’? ‘Dutton Ranch’ Season 2 release date info” — Decider
“Kelly Reilly and Cole Hauser Confirm They'll Start Filming ‘Dutton Ranch’ Season Two in “Early 2027”” — Holler Country Music

sections.heading: Timeline
paragraphs: The trend entry was published to the Google Trends feed at Sun, 19 Jul 2026 10:00:00 -0700. Our snapshot was taken at 2026-07-19T18:02:32+00:00 UTC and this briefing was assembled at 2026-07-19T18:03:09+00:00 UTC.

sections.heading: How to read these numbers
paragraphs: Google Trends reports approximate search volume as a lower bound (for example “20K+”). Actual volume can be significantly higher. Trending status reflects acceleration in searches, not the absolute size of a topic. For the full story behind the spike, read the cited coverage below — this briefing intentionally adds no speculation beyond the sourced facts.

faq.q: Why is “ed harris dutton ranch season 2” trending?
faq.a: Google's Trending Now feed links the spike to coverage from AL.com, Decider, Holler Country Music. The associated headlines are: “‘Dutton Ranch’ season 2 cast changes: See who isn’t coming back” (AL.com); “Is ‘Dutton Ranch’ on tonight? How many episodes are in ‘Dutton Ranch’? ‘Dutton Ranch’ Season 2 release date info” (Decider); “Kelly Reilly and Cole Hauser Confirm They'll Start Filming ‘Dutton Ranch’ Season Two in “Early 2027”” (Holler Country Music).

faq.q: How many people searched for “ed harris dutton ranch season 2”?
faq.a: Google reports at least 5,000 searches in US as of the feed snapshot. This is a published lower bound, not an exact count.

faq.q: Where is “ed harris dutton ranch season 2” trending?
faq.a: This snapshot covers US. The same term may trend differently in other regions.
